items.text: Phase 1. Review the supervised loop implementation and isolate concrete continuation-related failure modes
Phase 2. Design a continuation strategy that preserves the original task prompt while avoiding over-broad path prohibitions
Phase 3. Implement continuation prompt fixes for external-path guidance and retry prompt de-duplication
Phase 4. Author regression tests covering the repaired continuation behaviors
Phase 5. Run focused validation for supervised loop continuation and recovery flows
Phase 6. Review the repaired loop behavior and capture any residual risks

next_action: Use the captured Gemini rerun evidence to decide whether another external CLI-specific mitigation is warranted or whether the continuation repair can be considered validated enough to close.
notes: Treat this file as machine truth and keep Markdown synchronized.
DASHBOARD.md should show the actual progress of the active scope.
PLAN.md should list prompt-derived development items in `[ ] Phase N. <title>` format.
The installed guidance bundle and packaged asset copy should stay synchronized.
Legacy TASKS.md snapshots should be migrated forward into PLAN.md without losing checklist state.
This repair slice was focused on continuation prompt generation rather than another external CLI execution window.
The repaired areas are task-specific external-path guidance during retries and recursive continuation prompt growth across repeated rework attempts.

The latest external Gemini rerun in ~/samba/test/proc-mem-gemini-loop-v3 confirmed the repaired continuation prompt shape, but supervisor approval still failed because the CLI did not finish all required documentation artifacts.
